headline: Shares of restaurant companies are trading lower as concerns about overall inflation and consumer pressures dampen sentiment around the sector.

headline: Warren Buffett Was Right: Better Grab Safe Berkshire Hathaway Dividend Stocks Now
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: more than 65% of Berkshire’s massive portfolio is invested in ... Warren Buffett Was Right: Better Grab Safe Berkshire Hathaway Dividend Stocks Now
